description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of light-colored walls and large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is set on a landscaped lot with a driveway, a car parked in front, and several trees and shrubs surrounding the property. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The interior is partially visible, revealing multiple rooms and open spaces, with a garage attached to one side. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality and comfort.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a landscaped yard, and a backyard pool. The design is clean and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, landscaped yard, and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, patio area, swimming pool, and garage access.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the side of the house, backyard features, and more of the landscaping.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the roof, backyard pool, patio, and overall property layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, and adjacent landscaped path; minimalistic and functional.
